raw.official description: Frenetic Flight can knockback an enemy on impact when flying fast enough, dealing 50 damage on impact.

raw.ability details: * Moving forward goes in the exact direction Jetpack Cat faces, so looking up makes her fly up and looking down makes her fly down. ** Conversely, moving backwards while looking up makes her fly downwards and looking down while moving backwards makes her fly upwards. * Additionally, holding jump makes Jetpack Cat fly upwards and holding crouch makes her fly downwards. * Not affected by [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]].'"`UNIQ--ref-00000042-QINU`"' * Falls to the ground when hindered, knocked down, or frozen, or abilities that cause falling (e.g. [[File:Downpour.png|sub|link=Hazard#Downpour|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hazard#Downpour|Downpour]], [[File:Ability Binding Chain.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Binding Chain|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Binding Chain|Binding Chain]], [[File:Palantine_fang.png|middle|link=Vendetta#Palatine Fang|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Palatine Fang|Palatine Fang]]'s overhead strike).'"`UNIQ--ref-00000043-QINU`"' * Jetpack Cat cannot use jump pads nor activate elevators. ** However, anything that causes Jetpack Cat to fall to the ground (such as [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]]) will allow her to activate jump pads and elevators.'"`UNIQ--ref-00000044-QINU`"'

raw.official description: Purr now also damages nearby enemies for 33% of the healing amount. Knockback is removed
raw.ability details:
* It damages for 33% of the healing it ''would do'', regardless of whether allies or Jetpack Cat is at full health.
* Removed in Mid-Season 1 (2026).

raw.official description: Gain up to 50 shield health while carrying another hero.
raw.ability details: * This activates whether carrying '''allies or enemies'''.

raw.official description: 15% of Biotic Pawjectiles healing is converted into fuel.
raw.ability details: *Fuel per second: 18.15% while firing (15.03% w/ reload)

raw.official description: Toggle into transport mode, allowing an ally to be towed. Increases movement speed and heals your ally.
raw.ability details: * Unlike [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]], allies may choose to interact to be carried by Lifeline. ** The text "Grappled" will appear on the ally's screen while being carried. ** B.O.B. will automatically be carried if in the selection radius. ** If D.Va activates [[File:Ability-dva4.png|sub|link=D.Va#Self-Destruct|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Self-Destruct|Self-Destruct]] while being lifelined, the self-destructing mech (not the pilot) will continue to be carried. '"`UNIQ--ref-0000004E-QINU`"' * For the ally attached to Lifeline, using movement abilities or pressing space will disconnect the tether. ** When disconnected, momentum is carried, allowing for additional movement after use. * For Jetpack Cat, using primary fire, her ultimate, or pressing the key/button again will end Lifeline. ** However, she can use [[File:Ability Frenetic Flight.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Frenetic Flight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Frenetic Flight|Frenetic Flight]] and ''Could not find 'Purr' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' while using Lifeline. * Cannot carry connected targets ''through'' terrain, disconnecting them if they get too far from Jetpack Cat. * Abilities that require the player to be on the ground to use (Such as [[File:Ability-Junkrat5.png|sub|link=Junkrat#RIP-Tire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#RIP-Tire|RIP-Tire]] or [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]]) cannot be used while being carried in the air by Lifeline. ** They can still be used if tethered while on the ground.

shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.official description: Pulsing area heal that increases in frequency over time. Knockback nearby enemies when activated.
raw.ability details:
* Pulses once, then twice, then 3 times, then 4 times (10 pulses total).
* The knockback is only applied once when the enemy is within Purr's range.

abilities.name: Biotic Pawjectiles

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-reaper1.png|40x40px|middle|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shotgun|Shotgun ]] Shotgun (projectile)
raw.official description: Mid-range projectile spread that heals allies and damages enemies.
raw.fire rate: 4.48 volleys/s
raw.spread:
0 degrees (center shot)
0.3 degrees (close paw shots)
0.9 degrees (far paw shows)
raw.ability details:
* Damage/healing per second: 120.96 while firing (98.08 w/ reload)
* Does 45 damage if all paw pellets are headshots.
* Each shot is 5 pellets: 1 below the aiming reticle, and 4 above the aiming reticle in an arc. (It makes a paw 🐾 shape.)
** Though the lower pellet appears larger than the others, it is currently unknown whether it has a larger hitbox.
* The lower shot does not deal critical damage.
* At close range, the shots will actually hit completely to the left and right of the aiming reticle (outside the circle).

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: Quick Melee becomes empowered every 6 seconds, wounding enemies for 40 damage and slowing them by 30% for 1 second.
raw.ability details: * Wound damage counts as a [[damage over time]] effect. It can be cleansed and it ignores [[armor]].

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Accelerate in your movement direction. Fuel recovery is slower while carrying another player.
raw.ability details:
* It takes 4 seconds for Frenetic Flight to fully recharge.
* The ability can be used omnidirectionally.

abilities.name: Catnapper
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Dive towards a ground location, knocking down enemies and tethering the nearest one to you.
raw.ability details: * Fully recharges [[File:Ability Frenetic Flight.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Frenetic Flight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Frenetic Flight|Frenetic Flight]] energy meter on use. * The ultimate can only be used if targeting a flat surface or slope. ** If used on a wall, it will automatically target the floor below the wall, if in sight. ** Will automatically target the floor at the max range if pointing beyond the range. ** Cannot be used if targeting areas outside the environment, and will instead target the closest surface from that area. * Jetpack Cat automatically activates [[File:Ability Lifeline.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Lifeline|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Lifeline|Lifeline]] when the ultimate is used: if no enemies are hit, Lifeline will remain active until disabled. * Jetpack Cat can use [[File:Ability Purr.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Purr|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Purr|Purr]], [[File:Ability Frenetic Flight.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Frenetic Flight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Frenetic Flight|Frenetic Flight]] and [[quick melee]] while carrying an enemy, but not their primary fire. * Unlike with [[File:Ability Lifeline.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Lifeline|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Lifeline|Lifeline]], connected enemies cannot exit the tether early with movement abilities or jumping. ** Only a very few abilities can break the tether. A few examples are: [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]], [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]], [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]], [[File:Overrun_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Overrun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Overrun|Overrun]], and an enemy cat's ''Could not find 'Catnapper' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. ** Abilities that you might intuitively expect to break the tether do not (such as [[File:Ability-mei2.png|sub|link=Mei#Cryo-Freeze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Cryo-Freeze|Cryo-Freeze]]). ** However, abilities that dont break tether but do hinder JPC (such as Flashbang) are considered counters. * Can be cancelled by Jetpack Cat by pressing Ultimate again or by activating Lifeline. ** Unlike Lifeline, cannot be cancelled by Jetpack Cat pressing primary fire. * Connected targets can get stuck on terrain, disconnecting them if they get too far from Jetpack Cat. * If an enemy D.Va has been catnapped, and then activates [[File:Ability-dva4.png|sub|link=D.Va#Self-Destruct|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Self-Destruct|Self-Destruct]], the mech (not the pilot) will remain tethered. ** However, a mech that is already self-destructing cannot be catnapped. * Using Catnapper to drop an enemy off a cliff grants zero ult charge. '"`UNIQ--ref-00000055-QINU`"''"`UNIQ--ref-00000056-QINU`"' ** However, hitting them with [[File:Ability Purr.png|sub|link=Jetpack Cat#Purr|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Jetpack Cat#Purr|Purr]] after dropping them will change it to a Purr environmental kill, granting ult charge. '"`UNIQ--ref-00000057-QINU`"'
